description: '''Mizrahi music''' ({{langx|he|מוזיקה מזרחית|muzika mizrachit}}, {{IPA|he|ˈmuzika mizraˈχit|pron}}, {{Literal translation|Eastern music|Oriental music}}) refers to a music genre in [[Music of Israel|Israel]] that combines elements from the [[Middle East]], [[North Africa]], and [[Europe]]; and is mostly performed by [[Israelis]] of [[Mizrahi Jewish]] descent.{{sfn|Horowitz|1999|pp=452-453}} It is usually sung in [[Modern Hebrew]], or literary [[Hebrew]].{{sfn|Horowitz|1999|p=453}}
